blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 811 ft. Looking ahead, 49 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 71".
